findings.message: 'background: Background tasks (typically lightweight models)' uses 'typically' without specifying which model tier or concrete example qualifies
Commands ccr stop, ccr restart, ccr code, ccr ui, and ccr activate have no output or 'produces no output' note; users cannot verify expected behavior
EN start.md documents default port 8080; zh-CN start.md documents 3456; same binary, same option, one is wrong — affects start.md and status.md simultaneously
Backup directory (dated 20260101_205603) in tracked repo contains preset.md and statusline.md that have diverged from current: wrong Router separator, wrong api_base_url, missing locale links
Router manifest example uses 'openai:gpt-4' (colon separator) instead of correct 'openai,gpt-4' (comma separator)
Manifest example uses 'api_base_url': 'https://api.openai.com/v1' (bare) while EN and zh-CN current versions use '/v1/chat/completions'; backup has drifted
Related command link '/docs/cli/commands/status' missing '/zh' locale prefix; navigates zh-CN users to English page
zh-CN translation of other.md inherits the same missing output coverage for all five auxiliary commands
Default port documented as 3456 in zh-CN but 8080 in EN start.md; one value is incorrect
Status example output shows port 3456 in zh-CN but 8080 in EN status.md; same root cause as start.md mismatch
Related command link '/docs/cli/commands/status' missing locale prefix in current zh-CN doc; same bug as backup version, not fixed on promotion
All four devDependencies use '^' semver ranges (@types/node, esbuild, shx, typescript); minor/patch bumps can silently alter build output or introduce compromised transitive deps
npm publish to public registry for @musistudio/llms without provenance attestation or OTP enforcement; compromised CI credentials enable malicious package release
npm publish to public registry for @CCR/cli without provenance attestation; same risk surface as line 65
docker push to Docker Hub without content signing (DOCKER_CONTENT_TRUST); compromised credentials enable silent image replacement
docker push of 'latest' tag to Docker Hub without content signing; 'latest' is the most widely pulled tag, making unsigned push highest-impact
Default port documented as 3456 in zh-CN but 8080 in EN start.md; one value is incorrect
